title: evolvulus lithospermoides var. lithospermoides
intro: Evolvulus lithospermoides var. lithospermoides, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze or Evolvulus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. It is native to Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Evolvulus lithospermoides var. lithospermoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
